title: There's A post from Dr Eric Bergs the talks about Organ therapy
body:
Not sure if you've heard of him, but he's saying, ingesting the respective organ of animals can heal the damaged organ. No harm in trying unless you're perhaps vegan, maybe it will help you? I'll post the link below, if you try it and it helps you, let me know, I'm curious:

[https://youtu.be/GSTyaw7HY1M](https://youtu.be/GSTyaw7HY1M)
